query:
SELECT a.id as aluno_id, a.name as aluno_nome, a.email as aluno_email, a.consultorId, 
       c.name as mentor_nome,
       u.id as user_id, u.name as user_name, u.alunoId as user_alunoId
FROM alunos a
LEFT JOIN consultors c ON a.consultorId = c.id
LEFT JOIN users u ON u.alunoId = a.id
WHERE c.name LIKE '%Adriana%'
ORDER BY a.id;
